name: Chocolat Pots De Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 225°F.
2. Heat cream until hot but not boiling.
3. Add half the sugar and stir until dissolved.
4. In a separate saucepan, beat yolks and whole egg.
5. To the egg mixture, add remaining sugar, vanilla, and salt.
6. Slowly pour the heated cream into the eggs, stirring constantly.
7. Melt chocolate in a heavy saucepan over low heat.
8. Remove from heat and slowly add half the cream and egg mixture, stirring constantly.
9. Add the remainder of the mixture and stir until well combined.
10. Strain through a fine sieve.
11. Pour into individual ceramic or glass serving dishes.
12. Place dishes in a shallow pan of hot water.
13. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
14. Chill.
15. Top with whipped cream if desired.
